api/TestHelper.Random.IRandom.html.title: Interface IRandom | Random Test Helper | 0.1.0
api/TestHelper.Random.IRandom.html.keywords: Interface IRandom Namespace TestHelper.Random Random number generator interface similar to System.Random class. public interface IRandom Extension Methods RandomExtensions.NextNormalizedVector2(IRandom) RandomExtensions.NextNormalizedVector3(IRandom) RandomExtensions.NextScreenPosition(IRandom) RandomExtensionsUnity.ColorHSV(IRandom, float, float, float, float, float, float, float, float) RandomExtensionsUnity.RandomRangeInt(IRandom, int, int) RandomExtensionsUnity.Range(IRandom, int, int) RandomExtensionsUnity.Range(IRandom, float, float) RandomExtensionsUnity.insideUnitCircle(IRandom) RandomExtensionsUnity.insideUnitSphere(IRandom) RandomExtensionsUnity.onUnitSphere(IRandom) RandomExtensionsUnity.rotation(IRandom) RandomExtensionsUnity.rotationUniform(IRandom) RandomExtensionsUnity.value(IRandom) Methods Next() Returns a non-negative random integer. int Next() Returns int A 32-bit signed integer greater than or equal to zero and less than int.MaxValue. Next(int) Returns a non-negative random integer that is less than the specified maximum. int Next(int maxValue) Parameters maxValue int The exclusive upper bound of the random number to be generated. maxValue must be greater than or equal to zero. Returns int A 32-bit signed integer greater than or equal to zero, and less than maxValue; that is, the range of return values ordinarily includes zero but not maxValue. However, if maxValue equals zero, maxValue is returned. Next(int, int) Returns a random integer that is within a specified range. int Next(int minValue, int maxValue) Parameters minValue int The inclusive lower bound of the random number returned. maxValue int The exclusive upper bound of the random number returned. maxValue must be greater than or equal to minValue. Returns int A 32-bit signed integer greater than or equal to minValue and less than maxValue; that is, the range of return values includes minValue but not maxValue. If minValue equals maxValue, minValue is returned. NextBytes(byte[]) Fills the elements of a specified array of bytes with random numbers. void NextBytes(byte[] buffer) Parameters buffer byte[] An array of bytes to contain random numbers. NextDouble() Returns a random floating-point number between 0.0 and 1.0. double NextDouble() Returns double A double-precision floating point number greater than or equal to 0.0, and less than 1.0.

api/TestHelper.Random.RandomExtensionsUn.keywords: Class RandomExtensionsUnity Namespace TestHelper.Random Random number generator extensions similar to UnityEngine.Random class. public static class RandomExtensionsUnity Inheritance object RandomExtensionsUnity Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Methods ColorHSV(IRandom, float, float, float, float, float, float, float, float) Generates a random color from HSV and alpha ranges. public static Color ColorHSV(this IRandom random, float hueMin = 0, float hueMax = 1, float saturationMin = 0, float saturationMax = 1, float valueMin = 0, float valueMax = 1, float alphaMin = 1, float alphaMax = 1) Parameters random IRandom hueMin float Minimum hue [0..1]. hueMax float Maximum hue [0..1]. saturationMin float Minimum saturation [0..1]. saturationMax float Maximum saturation [0..1]. valueMin float Minimum value [0..1]. valueMax float Maximum value [0..1]. alphaMin float Minimum alpha [0..1]. alphaMax float Maximum alpha [0..1]. Returns Color A random color with HSV and alpha values in the (inclusive) input ranges. Values for each component are derived via linear interpolation of value. RandomRangeInt(IRandom, int, int) Return a random int within [minInclusive..maxExclusive) (Read Only). public static int RandomRangeInt(this IRandom random, int minInclusive, int maxExclusive) Parameters random IRandom minInclusive int maxExclusive int Returns int Range(IRandom, int, int) Return a random int within [minInclusive..maxExclusive) (Read Only). public static int Range(this IRandom random, int minInclusive, int maxExclusive) Parameters random IRandom minInclusive int maxExclusive int Returns int Range(IRandom, float, float) Returns a random float within [minInclusive..maxInclusive] (range is inclusive). public static float Range(this IRandom random, float minInclusive, float maxInclusive) Parameters random IRandom minInclusive float maxInclusive float Returns float insideUnitCircle(IRandom) Returns a random point inside or on a circle with radius 1.0 (Read Only). public static Vector2 insideUnitCircle(this IRandom random) Parameters random IRandom Returns Vector2 insideUnitSphere(IRandom) Returns a random point inside or on a sphere with radius 1.0 (Read Only). public static Vector3 insideUnitSphere(this IRandom random) Parameters random IRandom Returns Vector3 onUnitSphere(IRandom) Returns a random point on the surface of a sphere with radius 1.0 (Read Only). public static Vector3 onUnitSphere(this IRandom random) Parameters random IRandom Returns Vector3 rotation(IRandom) Returns a random rotation (Read Only). public static Quaternion rotation(this IRandom random) Parameters random IRandom Returns Quaternion rotationUniform(IRandom) Returns a random rotation with uniform distribution (Read Only). public static Quaternion rotationUniform(this IRandom random) Parameters random IRandom Returns Quaternion value(IRandom) Returns a random float within [0.0..1.0] (range is inclusive) (Read Only). public static float value(this IRandom random) Parameters random IRandom Returns float

Using System.Random instance. public class RandomImpl : IRandom Inheritance object RandomImpl Implements IRandom Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) Extension Methods RandomExtensions.NextNormalizedVector2(IRandom) RandomExtensions.NextNormalizedVector3(IRandom) RandomExtensions.NextScreenPosition(IRandom) RandomExtensionsUnity.ColorHSV(IRandom, float, float, float, float, float, float, float, float) RandomExtensionsUnity.RandomRangeInt(IRandom, int, int) RandomExtensionsUnity.Range(IRandom, int, int) RandomExtensionsUnity.Range(IRandom, float, float) RandomExtensionsUnity.insideUnitCircle(IRandom) RandomExtensionsUnity.insideUnitSphere(IRandom) RandomExtensionsUnity.onUnitSphere(IRandom) RandomExtensionsUnity.rotation(IRandom) RandomExtensionsUnity.rotationUniform(IRandom) RandomExtensionsUnity.value(IRandom) Constructors RandomImpl() Initializes a new instance of the RandomWrapper class, using Environment.TickCount to seed value. public RandomImpl() See Also Random RandomImpl(int) Initializes a new instance of the Random class, using the specified seed value. public RandomImpl(int seed) Parameters seed int A number used to calculate a starting value for the pseudo-random number sequence. If a negative number is specified, the absolute value of the number is used. See Also Random Methods Next() Returns a non-negative random integer. public virtual int Next() Returns int A 32-bit signed integer greater than or equal to zero and less than int.MaxValue. See Also Random Next(int) Returns a non-negative random integer that is less than the specified maximum. public virtual int Next(int maxValue) Parameters maxValue int The exclusive upper bound of the random number to be generated. maxValue must be greater than or equal to zero. Returns int A 32-bit signed integer greater than or equal to zero, and less than maxValue; that is, the range of return values ordinarily includes zero but not maxValue. However, if maxValue equals zero, maxValue is returned. See Also Random Next(int, int) Returns a random integer that is within a specified range. public virtual int Next(int minValue, int maxValue) Parameters minValue int The inclusive lower bound of the random number returned. maxValue int The exclusive upper bound of the random number returned. maxValue must be greater than or equal to minValue. Returns int A 32-bit signed integer greater than or equal to minValue and less than maxValue; that is, the range of return values includes minValue but not maxValue. If minValue equals maxValue, minValue is returned. See Also Random NextBytes(byte[]) Fills the elements of a specified array of bytes with random numbers. public virtual void NextBytes(byte[] buffer) Parameters buffer byte[] An array of bytes to contain random numbers. See Also Random NextDouble() Returns a random floating-point number between 0.0 and 1.0. public virtual double NextDouble() Returns double A double-precision floating point number greater than or equal to 0.0, and less than 1.0. See Also Random ToString() Returns a string that represents the current object. public override string ToString() Returns string A string that represents the current object. manual/index.html.title: Random Test Helper | Random Test Helper | 0.1.0
manual/index.html.keywords: Random Test Helper Wrapper and test stubs reference implementation for Random class. Required Unity 2019 LTS or later. Features Wrapper interface for System.Random IRandom interface is a wrapper interface for System.Random class. You can inject a test stub in your tests by replacing it with a RandomImpl instance. Extensions similar UnityEngine.Random RandomExtensionsUnity provides extension methods similar to UnityEngine.Random class. (TBD) Extensions useful for testing RandomExtensions provides extension methods useful for testing. Installation You can choose from two typical installation methods. Install via Package Manager window Open the Package Manager tab in Project Settings window (Editor > Project Settings) Click + button under the Scoped Registries and enter the following settings (figure 1.): Name: package.openupm.com URL: https://package.openupm.com Scope(s): com.nowsprinting Open the Package Manager window (Window > Package Manager) and select My Registries in registries drop-down list (figure 2.) Click Install button on the com.nowsprinting.test-helper.random package Figure 1. Package Manager tab in Project Settings window. Figure 2. Select registries drop-down list in Package Manager window. Install via OpenUPM-CLI If you installed openupm-cli, run the command below: openupm add com.nowsprinting.test-helper.random Add assembly reference Open your product and test assembly definition file (.asmdef) in Inspector window Add TestHelper.Random into Assembly Definition References License MIT License How to contribute Open an issue or create a pull request. Be grateful if you could label the PR as enhancement, bug, chore, and documentation. See PR Labeler settings for automatically labeling from the branch name. How to development Add this repository as a submodule to the Packages/ directory in your project. git submodule add https://github.com/nowsprinting/test-helper.random.git Packages/com.nowsprinting.test-helper.random Generate a temporary project and run tests on each Unity version from the command line. make create_project UNITY_VERSION=2019.4.40f1 make -k test Release workflow Run Actions > Create release pull request > Run workflow and merge created pull request. (Or bump version in package.json on default branch) Then, Will do the release process automatically by Release workflow. And after tagging, OpenUPM retrieves the tag and updates it. Do NOT manually operation the following operations: Create a release tag Publish draft releases
